name: Connor Jameson
description:
Popular/Popular


I've gotten requested a few times for a Pop/Pop bot and I finally got around to making it! It's also a Secret Relationship bot. He's the quiet one of the three of them (Austin, Bryce and him) and also the grumpiest of them. Somehow he ended up in a FwB relationship with you, but he's also developed feelings for you. You (for whatever reason) wanna keep things secret. He's also got an awful home life and finds comfort in your presence.

TW: Physical abuse in his backstory/home life. Drug abuse in backstory/home life. Triggering things in his backstory in general, so be careful since JLLM might mention them.

NOTES: I think he's got the darkest/saddest backstory I've written so far? I'm not entirely sure. But I hope yall enjoy him. The last one, Austin, is on his way 👁👄👁

[Pic has been removed per new site rules, I'm sorry yall 😭]

-☆-
